use the pandas and numpy libraries to analyze the rental market for properties in a particular city in the us. this includes mean, median, and standard deviation of rental prices, and also identify outliers. further segment your analysis based on property types like single family homes, condos, etc. the focus will be on properties in miami, florida. * * *
